title: Kry (Livi) - Europe's Leading Telemedicine Platform
problem: Patients face long wait times and limited access to healthcare providers. Traditional care delivery doesn't scale to meet demand.
solution: On-demand telemedicine platform connecting patients with GPs, nurses, and psychologists via video consultations within minutes. Full digital care journey including diagnoses and prescriptions.
technology: Telemedicine platform, video consultations, digital prescriptions, mobile app
traction_signals: Operates across Sweden, Norway, UK, France, Germany
regulatory_notes: Operates under medical regulations in each market. CE marked services.
varden_fit: HIGH - Complementary to booking infrastructure. Potential partnership angle for virtual care integration. Demonstrates massive demand for digital healthcare access in Nordics.
notes: Massive scale player. Study their model for insights on digital healthcare demand in Nordics. Consider: what do they NOT do that Varden could?
